fr:resource.fr:resource-source: \begin {tikzpicture}[diagram] \SpliceDiagramSquare { nw = A, ne = \mathbb {I} \times A, sw = {\mathopen {}\left \{\bot \right \}\mathclose {}}, se = {\mathopen {}\left \{\bot \right \}\mathclose {}} \amalg _A {\mathbb {I}\times A}, east = \eta , south = \bot , west = !_A, north = {\mathopen {}\left \langle 0,1_{A}\right \rangle \mathclose {}}, se/style = pushout, width = 2.5cm, } \end {tikzpicture}
